name: dotnet-ef
description: Manage EF Core migrations (list, add, remove, apply, script) and inspect DbContext configuration.

tools.name: ef_list_migrations
tools.description: List all EF Core migrations and their applied/pending status.

tools.name: ef_add_migration
tools.description: Scaffold a new EF Core migration for pending model changes.

tools.name: ef_remove_migration
tools.description: Remove the last unapplied EF Core migration.

tools.name: ef_update_database
tools.description: Apply pending migrations to the database.

tools.name: ef_script_migration
tools.description: Generate an idempotent SQL script for EF Core migrations.

tools.name: ef_get_dbcontext_info
tools.description: List all DbContext classes and their provider/connection details.
